name: Cheese Fondue#2
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Dry white wine such as Sauterne
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the butter in the top part of a double boiler and place directly on the burner.
2. Bring to boil.
3. Put the pan in the bottom of the double boiler.
4. Add 4 cups of Swiss American cheese.
5. Add 3 tablespoons cornstarch, softened with water.
6. Stir until the cheese melts.
7. Place into a fondue pot.
